TH_PATCHOULI-UNSTABLE_PHILOSOPHERS_STONE: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Element[/gold].

Similarly, the panacea of alchemy can quickly transform matter from one nature to another noble nature, first suppressing its roughness and despising its spirit, eliminating its characteristics and impurities. This is the secret of the panacea, as said by the ancient sages. — The Book of the Wise
TH_PATCHOULI-PHILOSOPHERS_STONE.title: Seven-Star Essence
TH_PATCHOULI-PHILOSOPHERS_STONE.descript: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] of every [gold]Element[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-PHILOSOPHERS_STONE.flavor: A crystal formed from the long sedimentation of the seven elemental stars, capable of releasing powerful magic.
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_REAPER_RELIC.title: Reaper Counter
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_REAPER_RELIC.descript: Your [gold]Lunar Reaper[/gold] deals increased damage equal to the counter.
TH_PATCHOULI-LUNAR_REAPER_RELIC.flavor: [red]The details of this relic will never be revealed.[/red]
TH_PATCHOULI-INSTRUMENT.title: Experimental Apparatus
TH_PATCHOULI-INSTRUMENT.description: Whenever you play one [gold]Power[/gold], one [gold]Attack[/gold], and one [gold]Skill[/gold] card in the same turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Artifact[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-INSTRUMENT.flavor: A collection of laboratory equipment including flasks, beakers, and graduated cylinders.
TH_PATCHOULI-ZENER_CARDS.title: Zener Cards
TH_PATCHOULI-ZENER_CARDS.description: Whenever you play a card, reduce its Energy cost by [blue]1[/blue] this combat.
TH_PATCHOULI-ZENER_CARDS.flavor:
"If you guess the pattern on the card, you'll gain psychic powers."
That's what they say in the outside world.
TH_PATCHOULI-RED_STONE.title: Aja Red Stone
TH_PATCHOULI-RED_STONE.description: Whenever you play a card, play it extra times equal to its base Energy cost.
TH_PATCHOULI-RED_STONE.flavor: A rare beautiful crystal that internally reflects light millions of times, possessing immense energy amplification capabilities.
TH_PATCHOULI-RED_HALL_ROCKET.title: Red Hall Moon Rocket
TH_PATCHOULI-RED_HALL_ROCKET.description:
[gold]Right-click relic[/gold] to enable/disable its effect.
When choosing the next room, you may go to any room. Cooldown: [blue]5[/blue] rooms. (Note: Do not go to a room you've already visited; it can softlock the game.)
TH_PATCHOULI-RED_HALL_ROCKET.flavor: A rocket jointly built by the Scarlet Devil Mansion and Kappa Heavy Industries. Very sturdy and comfortable.
TH_PATCHOULI-CRYSTAL_BALL.title: Crystal Ball
TH_PATCHOULI-CRYSTAL_BALL.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Scry[/gold] [blue]5[/blue].
TH_PATCHOULI-CRYSTAL_BALL.flavor: A ritual crystal ball used for divination. Perhaps you can glimpse a corner of fate through it.
TH_PATCHOULI-TELESCOPE.title: Telescope
TH_PATCHOULI-TELESCOPE.description: At the start of each combat, [gold]Scry[/gold] [blue]10[/blue].
TH_PATCHOULI-TELESCOPE.flavor: A primary tool for observing celestial bodies and capturing astronomical information.
TH_PATCHOULI-RED_HALL_MOONCAKE.title: Red Hall Mooncake
TH_PATCHOULI-RED_HALL_MOONCAKE.descripti:
Upon pickup, increase your maximum HP by [blue]9[/blue].
At the end of your turn, heal [blue]50%[/blue] of lost HP.
TH_PATCHOULI-RED_HALL_MOONCAKE.flavor: A noble mooncake made with great effort by the Scarlet Devil Mansion. For some reason, the filling is meat.
TH_PATCHOULI-CARD_PREPARE.title: Preparation Talisman
TH_PATCHOULI-CARD_PREPARE.description: If you end your turn with unspent {Energy:energyIcons()}, increase your {Energy:energyIcons()} cap by {Energy:energyIcons()} this combat.
TH_PATCHOULI-CARD_PREPARE.flavor:
One of the masterpieces of a certain market god, derived from Patchouli Knowledge's ability.
For a magician, preserving mana is the most important thing, right?
TH_PATCHOULI-CARD_TRAINING.title: Magician's Basic Practice
TH_PATCHOULI-CARD_TRAINING.description:
Whenever you defeat a [blue]Normal[/blue]/[red]Elite[/red]/[purple]Boss[/purple], increase a counter by [blue]1[/blue]/[red]3[/red]/[purple]5[/purple].
Cards with rarity "Basic" deal bonus damage and grant bonus [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the counter.
TH_PATCHOULI-CARD_TRAINING.flavor:
One of the masterpieces of a certain market god, derived from Patchouli Knowledge's ability.
Do you think a magic array is just an ordinary spell that draws coins from bullets?
In the hands of a magician, it becomes a true destructive weapon.
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_BOOK.title: Elemental Book
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_BOOK.description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust Elements[/gold] to [red]Enhance[/red] or [purple]Transform[/purple] a card, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] that card this combat.
TH_PATCHOULI-ELEMENT_BOOK.flavor: A grimoire recording the secrets of elemental conversion and combination. Only a magician who has practiced for many years can unleash its power.
TH_PATCHOULI-SAGE_STAFF.title: Sage's Staff
TH_PATCHOULI-SAGE_STAFF.description:
[gold]Right-click relic[/gold] to enable/disable its effect.
You no longer deal damage. Effects that would deal damage instead cause enemies to lose that much maximum HP and you gain that much [gold]Gold[/gold].
TH_PATCHOULI-SAGE_STAFF.flavor: A staff with a Philosopher's Stone set into its tip, possessing the authority to turn stone into gold.
TH_PATCHOULI-DEEP_DARK_FANTASY.title: Deep Dark Fantasy
TH_PATCHOULI-DEEP_DARK_FANTASY.descripti:
At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
You can no longer see enemy intents.
TH_PATCHOULI-DESTINY_STONE.title: Destiny Stone
TH_PATCHOULI-DESTINY_STONE.flavor: Through the gem, you can see afterimages of the future.
TH_PATCHOULI-RAINBOW_LANTERN.title: Rainbow Lantern
TH_PATCHOULI-RAINBOW_LANTERN.flavor: A lantern that constantly changes colors. The light it emits seems to disperse into different elements.
TH_PATCHOULI-MAGICAL_STONE.title: Magical Stone
TH_PATCHOULI-MAGICAL_STONE.flavor: A magical stone extracted from ore, containing magical energy.
TH_PATCHOULI-EMERALD_TABLET.title: The Emerald Tablet
TH_PATCHOULI-EMERALD_TABLET.description: Your [gold]Elements[/gold] no longer decrease at the start of your turn.
TH_PATCHOULI-EMERALD_TABLET.flavor: It is said that Hermes, the source of wisdom, taught the main principles of alchemy, inscribed on an emerald tablet called the Emerald Tablet.
TH_PATCHOULI-SKY_STONE.title: Sky Stone
TH_PATCHOULI-SKY_STONE.description: While you have [orange]Sun Element[/orange] or [purple]Lunar Element[/purple], you deal [blue]50%[/blue] more damage and take [blue]50%[/blue] less damage.
TH_PATCHOULI-SKY_STONE.flavor: The fusion of Sun Stone and Moon Stone.
TH_PATCHOULI-MOON_STONE.title: Moon Stone
TH_PATCHOULI-MOON_STONE.description: While you have [purple]Lunar Element[/purple], you take [blue]50%[/blue] less damage.
TH_PATCHOULI-MOON_STONE.flavor: Contains power from the moon. Attributes increase under moonlight.
TH_PATCHOULI-SUN_STONE.title: Sun Stone
TH_PATCHOULI-SUN_STONE.description: While you have [orange]Sun Element[/orange], you deal [blue]50%[/blue] more damage.
TH_PATCHOULI-SUN_STONE.flavor: Contains power from the sun. Attributes increase under sunlight.
